name: vibespec
description: VibeSpec — AI product planning plugin for Claude and Codex. Turn product ideas into validated, editable SOTs with PRDs, feature specs, IA, user flows, and a self-contained HTML viewer.

plugins.name: vibespec
plugins.description: VibeSpec — turn an idea/planning doc into SOT JSON and edit PRD, Feature Spec, IA, and User Flow in an HTML viewer (KO/EN). 아이디어/기획 문서를 SOT JSON으로 생성하고 PRD·기능명세서·IA·유저플로우를 HTML 뷰어로 편집. 한/영 지원.
